changes.oldValue: Add Playwright or Cypress tests to verify the full 'Streak Repair' / Data Chip consumption flow.
changes.newValue: The streak repair flow lives in web/src/components/streak-repair-prompt.tsx and calls economy.ts repairStreak() → supabase RPC repair_streak. The prompt checks if yesterday was missed but day-before was played, and the user has chips. Write Playwright tests (or extend existing test setup) covering: happy path (chips available, repair succeeds), no chips (button disabled), already played yesterday (prompt not shown), and chip balance updates after repair.

newValue.text: E2E test: streak repair prompt appears when yesterday missed and chips > 0
E2E test: repair button consumes a chip and updates streak
E2E test: prompt does not appear when yesterday was played
E2E test: repair button is disabled when chips = 0
Tests run in CI (make test or equivalent)

snapshot.title: Implement E2E tests for Streak Repair flow
snapshot.description: The streak repair flow lives in web/src/components/streak-repair-prompt.tsx and calls economy.ts repairStreak() → supabase RPC repair_streak. The prompt checks if yesterday was missed but day-before was played, and the user has chips. Write Playwright tests (or extend existing test setup) covering: happy path (chips available, repair succeeds), no chips (button disabled), already played yesterday (prompt not shown), and chip balance updates after repair.

changes.newValue: Archived pre-MVP (2026-04-09). Streak repair UI simplified to static banner for MVP — full E2E tests deferred. Restore to todo on 2026-04-13.
